gap_findings.description: The EU makes no commitment on loss and damage in its NDCs.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: loss and damage is unavoidable even with adaptation; finance mechanisms urgently needed.

gap_findings.description: The EU's commitment to addressing loss and damage is conditional on receiving international finance.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: loss and damage is unavoidable even with adaptation; finance mechanisms urgently needed.

details.summary: The EU has no commitment to addressing loss and damage in its NDCs, and its existing commitment is conditional on receiving international finance.

pass_c.country_summary: The EU has no commitment to addressing loss and damage in its NDCs, and its existing commitment is conditional on receiving international finance.
pass_c.policy_recommendation: The EU should commit to addressing loss and damage in its NDCs and provide a clear plan for financing these efforts.
